# LLMS.txt for CareShift (Nurser)

llms-txt-version: 1.0

name: CareShift
alternate_names: Nurser
website: https://your-landing-page-url.com
category: Healthcare, Caregiving, Team Collaboration
languages: es, en, sv, de

summary: |
  CareShift (Nurser) is a modern, mobile-first platform for small caregiver teams to record patient observations, transfer information between shifts, and ensure reliable, structured handovers. Designed for ultra-fast data entry and immediate context, it replaces paper notebooks and informal messaging with a secure, collaborative digital tool.

features:
  - Ultra-fast event logging (one-tap actions)
  - Structured patient handover and shift summaries
  - Configurable observation fields (boolean, dropdown, numeric, etc.)
  - Voice notes with transcription
  - Push notifications for alerts and tasks
  - Team and patient management
  - Role-based permissions (Team Lead, Caregiver)
  - Mobile-first, PWA installable
  - Localization: Mexican Spanish (default), English, Swedish, German
  - Secure, encrypted, team-isolated data

api:
  contact:
    method: POST
    endpoint: /support/contact
    description: Submit a contact/support request. Accepts JSON body with phone, email, and message fields.
    request_format:
      phone: string (optional)
      email: string (optional)
      message: string (required)
    response_format:
      message: string

privacy:
  - HTTPS required
  - Authenticated access for all sensitive data
  - Role-based access control
  - Team-level data isolation
  - No data shared with third parties

compliance:
  - GDPR-ready
  - HIPAA-style protections (planned)

# For more, see PRD.md in this directory.
